mapper.insert: insert into t_stock_flow ( product_id, flow_type, change_quantity, before_quantity, after_quantity, order_number, task_no, business_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{productId}, #{flowType}, #{changeQuantity}, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{orderNumber}, #{taskNo}, #{businessTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
